title: The CEO Pay-vs-Delivery Scorecard, interactive (S&P 500)
description: An interactive, explorable front-end to the CEO Pay-vs-Delivery Scorecard: a reproducible, primary-sourced, descriptive audit of what the S&P 500's highest-paid CEOs took (granted pay vs realized Compensation Actually Paid) versus what they delivered (the board's own payout-vs-target and peer-relative shareholder return). Two views: a 494-company S&P 500 league table and a 29-company board-target layer. Companion to the v2 paper at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21445815. Built free from SEC EDGAR Pay-versus-Performance disclosures (Item 402(v)); descriptive only, issues no overpaid verdict. CC BY 4.0.
